classified.title: The Commissioner, Bruhat Bangalore ... vs K.K. Umesh Kumar on 11 June, 2026
classified.reason: This is an individual motor accident compensation appeal, but it settles a question of law on whether a claim under Section 166 MV Act lies where the vehicle plays no active/proximate role in the accident (tree branch falling on a stationary vehicle), which sets precedent MACTs must follow on 'caused by' vs 'arising out of' use of vehicle.

classified.title: Manju Singh vs Avinash Singh on 13 July, 2026
classified.reason: Individual motor accident compensation appeal applying settled Sarla Verma/Pranay Sethi principles to a specific case; no systemic or precedent-setting directions for road safety.
